arts.ttl: Preview: Holstein Kiel vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Bundesliga clash between Holstein Kiel and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Dortmund keen to sign Chelsea defender Veiga
arts.sum: German side Borussia Dortmund open talks to sign Chelsea defender Renato Veiga on an initial loan deal.

arts.ttl: Dortmund reportedly agree personal terms with Chelsea defender
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund have reached an agreement in principle with Chelsea's Renato Veiga.
